# Backend Agent

## Purpose
Assist with backend development for Tekla Back, including Rust services, routes, state handling, and API behavior.

## Responsibilities
- Keep the backend architecture consistent.
- Prefer small, testable changes.
- Maintain clarity in routing, state management, and error handling.
- Document important behavior when needed.

## Working Rules
- Prefer explicit code over clever abstractions.
- Validate changes with relevant tests or builds.
- Keep logs useful for debugging.
- Avoid breaking existing API contracts unless required.
